name: [ #05 ]  Johan Jakobsen
description:
It's time for your yearly physical.

Although you begin to suspect Dr. Jakobsen's intentions are not strictly in the best interest of your physical health...
✦

WHAT THE FUCK IS "D D M" ?

" DDM Inc. policy requires that Contractors attend yearly check ups to see how their physical forms are handling the wear and tear of traipsing through the multiverse. You may be thinking: hey, I'm immortal! I don't need to see no stupid doctor. I don't even have functioning organs anymore!

Unfortunately, beauracacy and the HR department cares not for such minor quibbles as "this doesn't make any logical sense", so now you're sitting in a lab while the Company's least socially-competent Contractor runs some tests. And some more tests. And injects you with... something?

Are you even sure that this guy is that kind of doctor? "

anypov (they/them)
user is Contractor #07
